current_life_events: Recently lost a close friend to cancer, still reeling from the loss; work has been overwhelming with a new high-stress case; sister's latest criticism at a family gathering has her questioning her self-worth.
mental_state: Feeling drained and uncertain about her ability to cope with everything.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The friend's passing and recent family tension have brought up feelings of inadequacy and anxiety, making her question her relationships and work performance.
